NAVAREA XIX 170/23
 BARENTS SEA
 1.AREA TEMPORARILY DANGEROUS TO NAVIGATION
 DUE TO ROCKET CARRIER ELEMENTS FALL
 27 TO 31 DEC DAILY FROM 0600 TO 0800 UTC.

 A. 75-59.0N 021-26.0E
 B. 75-50.0N 022-05.0E
 C. 75-35.0N 022-47.0E
 D. 75-21.0N 022-52.0E
 E. 75-15.0N 022-13.0E
 F. 75-24.0N 021-29.0E
 G. 75-36.0N 020-51.0E
 H. 75-53.0N 020-43.0E
 I. 75-59.0N 021-26.0E
  
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 167/23
 3. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 310800 DEC 23
